body:
## ⚠️ Draft — depends on 5 upstream PRs merging first

Each test file pins behavior introduced by a different unmerged PR. Merge order below:

| Test file | Pins behavior from |
|---|---|
| `test-config-masking.bats` | #994 — `_cmd_config_is_secret` + schema cache |
| `test-compose-summary-wrapper.bats` | #1016 — `_compose_run_with_summary` (was #1001 — closed/superseded) |
| `test-dream-cli-flags.bats` | #998 + #1002 — `set -euo pipefail` + nounset guards |
| `test-functional-resilience.bats` | #1003 — `dream-test-functional.sh` set-e resilience |
| `test-sr-resolve.bats` | #1016 — `sr_resolve` prefix-strip (was #1001 — closed/superseded) |

Once all 5 merge (#994, #998, #1002, #1003, #1016), rebase drops the merge commits and the PR diff becomes exactly 5 new `.bats` files (+890 LoC total, zero existing-file edits).

**Note (apr-25):** the original #1001 was closed in favor of its superset #1016; the test files in this PR target the same `_compose_run_with_summary` and `sr_resolve` behavior, which now ships in #1016. No code change needed in this PR — only the rebase target shifts to post-#1016 main.

## What
5 new BATS test files in `dream-server/tests/bats-tests/` locking in the post-PR-12 dream-cli refactors:

- **test-config-masking.bats** (17 cases) — `_cmd_config_is_secret` behavior from both `dream config show` and `dream preset diff` paths. Covers schema-driven masking, 7-keyword fallback (`secret/password/pass/token/key/salt/bearer`), case-insensitive, missing+malformed schema, zero-secret schema.
- **test-compose-summary-wrapper.bats** (11 cases) — PATH-injected `docker` stub with 3 modes (success / fail-keyword / fail-nomatch). Covers wrapper success/failure banners, log removal/preservation, keyword matching, zero-grep-match warn fallback under `set -euo pipefail`, argv passthrough, exit-code propagation.
- **test-dream-cli-flags.bats** (8 cases) — pins `set -euo pipefail` at L6, no weaker `set -e[^u]`, no bare `| head -1`, `sed -n '1p'` idiom presence, `${FOO:-default}` conditional-var count, `env -i` nounset safety.
- **test-functional-resilience.bats** (7 cases) — stubs `test_*_functional()` functions via awk injection. Covers summary emission under all-fail, first-fail-at-counter-0 not aborting (the #428 core bug), all-pass exit 0, mixed pass/fail runs all four, static asserts on counter arithmetic and bounded `set +e`/`-e`.
- **test-sr-resolve.bats** (10 cases) — subshell-isolated runs (critical: `declare -A` in service-registry.sh creates function-local arrays when sourced from bats setup()). Covers 8-case matrix (exact ID, alias, dream-prefix strip, unknown-dream passthrough, unknown non-dream, empty, dream-convention-false container) + 2 correctness guards.

## Testing
- [x] `bats tests/bats-tests/test-*.bats` — **53/53 pass** locally on macOS (homebrew bash 5.3)
- [x] `bash -n` + `shellcheck` on all 5 files clean
- [x] Full staging suite: 290 pass, 6 pre-existing failures in unrelated test files (docker-phase, path-utils, preflight-phase, requirements-phase) — zero new failures from my files
- [x] Pre-commit hooks clean

## Platform Impact
- **Linux CI** (primary): `test-linux.yml` runs `run-bats.sh` which auto-discovers `tests/bats-tests/*.bats`. All 53 new tests will run.
- **macOS dev**: passes with homebrew bash.
- **Windows**: no BATS runner exists; tests are not executed there.

---

## 📋 Chain status (operator's reminder — apr-25)

This PR is a **regression-shield test pack** that depends on 5 base PRs landing first:

```
#994  (READY)
#998  (DRAFT, blocked by #1008) ──┐
#1002 (DRAFT, blocked by #998)    ├──▶ #1018 (this — DRAFT)
#1003 (READY)                     │
#1016 (DRAFT, blocked by #999) ───┘
```

**Before this PR can be promoted:**
All 5 of the above must land. The order in which they land doesn't matter for this PR — each test file independently pins behavior from one of them. Once all 5 are in main, the rebase strips the staging-base merge commits and the diff collapses to 5 new `.bats` files only (no edits to existing files).

**After all 5 deps merge, the operator must:**
1. Rebase this branch onto post-{1008,994,998,1002,1003,999,1016} main. All "merge: ... as staging base" commits will drop out automatically (their content is in main).
2. Promote from DRAFT → ready (`gh pr ready 1018`).

Kept DRAFT until then as a mechanical safeguard.
title: test(dream-cli): BATS regression shield for 5 dream-cli / supporting behaviors
